description: As the International Yoga day is fast approaching, preparations to celebrate the day is in full swing. At Rajpath, full Dress rehearsal of International Day of Yoga was held this morning ... Hundreds  of enthusiastic participants took part in the dress rehearsal... Coming Sunday on 21st   Prime Minister Narendra Modi... will lead the nation to celebrate the first ever International Yoga Day at Rajpath. The event will also be organised at various places across the nation and the world as well to mark the day.
